message:
Add contiguous f64 tensor binary dispatch path and comprehensive tests

Extend ft-dispatch with a full tensor-level binary operation dispatch
path alongside the existing scalar dispatch, plus refactor shared
dispatch-key resolution logic:

Refactors:
- Extract resolve_dispatch_keys from dispatch_scalar_binary_with_keyset
  to deduplicate key selection, fallback, and strict-mode gating logic
- Extract dispatch_keyset_for_device as shared helper; refactor
  dispatch_keyset_for_tensors to delegate to it
- Move the incompatible-set guard into resolve_dispatch_keys so both
  scalar and tensor paths share it

New public API:
- TensorDispatchOutcome struct returning Vec<f64> + DispatchDecision
- dispatch_keyset_for_tensor_meta for building keysets from TensorMeta
- dispatch_tensor_binary_contiguous_f64 (convenience with auto-keyset)
- dispatch_tensor_binary_contiguous_f64_with_keyset (explicit keyset)
  Both support Add, Sub, Mul, Div across CPU and AutogradCPU keys

New imports from ft_kernel_cpu:
- add_tensor_contiguous_f64, sub_tensor_contiguous_f64,
  mul_tensor_contiguous_f64, div_tensor_contiguous_f64

New tests:
- dispatch_keyset_for_tensor_meta_tracks_requires_grad
- tensor_dispatch_strict_mode_uses_cpu_add_kernel
- tensor_dispatch_hardened_mode_allows_composite_fallback
- tensor_dispatch_strict_mode_rejects_composite_fallback
- tensor_dispatch_propagates_kernel_dtype_mismatch
- tensor_dispatch_propagates_non_contiguous_layout_rejection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
